---
title: "GrassPatch2024 Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```


```{r}
#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
getwd()
```



# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
# tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)
```

```{r}
tar_load(df_new_obs)
tar_load(df_obs_mean_harv_pheno)
```

```{r}
tar_load(validated_met_file)
tar_read(validated_met_file)
tar_load(df_obs_pheno_dates)
tar_load(df_pheno_dates_paramInput)
tar_load(df_haun)
#tar_invalidate(df_haun)
tar_load(df_haun_pheno_dates)
tar_load(df_pheno_raw)
tar_load(df_pheno_int)
tar_load(df_pheno_haun)
tar_load(df_pheno_final)
tar_load(df_pheno_input_param)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_harv)
tar_load(qc_apsim_observed_harv)
```

```{r}
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_harv)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_harv_renamed)
tar_load(track_mapping_csv)
tar_load(qc_apsim_observed)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_harv_renamed_corrected_with_amounts)
tar_load(qc_apsim_observed)
```
